description: Negative fixture cases for the shiproom-dashboard gate. Each case is a complete dashboard that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_shiproom_dashboard.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the panel-narrowing and packet-freshness-SLO rejections honest even if the canonical dashboard changes shape.

cases.summary: A dashboard panel whose state forces narrowing still renders a Stable lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A green dashboard panel rides a freshness packet whose SLO state is breached, so the packet-freshness automation must narrow it before promotion.
